title: MailChimp Integration
excerpt: I’m working on figuring out how the MailChimp integration can be useful to our team and was wondering if there’s a way to send an email from MailChimp when the status changes on an item? Is there perhaps a list of the ma…

posts.author: NKarAli (Nikki Kar-Ali)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m working on figuring out how the MailChimp integration can be useful to our team and was wondering if there’s a way to send an email from MailChimp when the status changes on an item? Is there perhaps a list of the mailchimp integration capabilities somewhere?
